channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How to watch Mayor of Kingstown season 4 online from anywhere – stream Taylor Sheridan crime drama
item.description: Jeremy Renner stars as the "Mayor" looking to stop all out gang war as the hit show returns. Here's how to watch Mayor of Kingstown season 4 online no matter where in the world you are.
item.dc:creator: Tom Wardley, TechRadar

item.title: Your latest prescription is to get outside
item.description: Health care providers are trying a new tactic to promote the healing effects of nature: They're actually writing prescriptions for it.
item.dc:creator: Todd Richmond, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: OpenAI’s company knowledge wants access to all of your internal data
item.description: OpenAI on Thursday rolled out its latest offering, a comprehensive data collection and analysis capability called “company knowledge”.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: About 4 in 10 worried about environmental impacts of AI: Survey
item.description: A new poll shows growing concerns among citizens over the potential environmental effects caused by artificial intelligence. The Associated Press-NORC Center poll, released Thursday, found about 4 in 10 U.S.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Sanders: Government should break up OpenAI
item.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.) said he believes the government should break up OpenAI, underscoring his concerns about AI's potential impact on the job market and interpersonal relationships.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Intel rallies after forecast signals a comeback Is underway
item.description: Intel Corp. shares jumped after the chipmaker returned to profitability and gave an upbeat revenue forecast, suggesting that it's making progress on a long and challenging comeback attempt.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Can’t wait for the touchscreen MacBook Pro M6? This wild, affordable accessory brings touch to your current Mac
item.description: The LapTouch can add touchscreen functionality to any MacBook for a fraction of the cost of a new Mac.
item.dc:creator: Alex Blake, TechRadar

item.title: AI browsers can be abused by malicious AI sidebar extensions: Report
item.description: AI browsers may be smart, but they’re not smart enough to block a common threat: Malicious extensions. That’s the conclusion of researchers at SquareX, who on Thursday released a report showing how attackers can exploit AI sidebars through compromised browser extensions.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Musk's rollercoaster year: From boycotts and plunging earnings to a potential trillion-dollar payday
item.description: Elon Musk literally left a government job with a black eye, has seen profits at his car company sink and must worry about federal regulators disrupting his plans to unleash a fleet of driverless taxis on America's roads in the next few years.
item.dc:creator: Bernard Condon, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump pardons Binance founder Changpeng Zhao, high-profile cryptocurrency figure
item.description: President Donald Trump has pardoned Binance founder Changpeng Zhao, who created the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange and served prison time for failing to stop criminals from using the platform to move money connected to child sex abuse, drug trafficking and terrorism.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: AWS reveals new cloud incident reporting tool, with almost zero sense of irony
item.description: AWS CloudWatch will get new incident report generation tool - days after an AWS outage affected parts of the internet.
item.dc:creator: Craig Hale, TechRadar

item.title: Trump calls off plans to deploy federal troops to San Francisco
item.description: President Trump said Thursday he would not deploy federal troops to San Francisco, reversing course on plans to implement anticrime and immigration enforcement in the Bay Area.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, The Hill

item.title: American e-waste is causing a 'hidden tsunami' in Southeast Asia, report says
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Millions of tons of discarded electronics from the United States are being shipped overseas, much of it to developing countries in Southeast Asia unprepared to safely handle hazardous waste, according to a new report released Wednesday by an environmental watchdog.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Solarium commission urges reversal on Trump’s cyber cuts
item.description: Cuts at CISA, the State Department and elsewhere have stalled, and in some cases reversed, progress on the Cyberspace Solarium Commission's recommendations. The post Solarium commission urges reversal on Trump’s cyber cuts first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Reddit sues AI company Perplexity and others for 'industrial-scale' scraping of user comments
item.description: Social media platform Reddit sued the artificial intelligence company Perplexity AI and three other entities on Wednesday, alleging their involvement in an “industrial-scale, unlawful” economy to “scrape” the comments of millions of Reddit users for commercial gain.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: AI helps IT teams resolve incidents faster, report finds
item.description: New data suggests that generative artificial intelligence (genAI) is delivering measurable benefits for IT organizations and their IT Service Management (ITSM) efforts.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Meta cutting 600 AI jobs even as it continues to hire more for its superintelligence lab
item.description: MENLO PARK, Calif. (AP) — Meta Platforms is cutting roughly 600 artificial intelligence jobs even as it continues to hire more workers for its superintelligence lab, the company confirmed on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ukraine unveils upgraded sea drone it says can strike anywhere in the Black Sea
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine's state security service has unveiled an upgraded sea drone it says can now operate anywhere in the Black Sea, carry heavier weapons and use artificial intelligence for targeting.
item.dc:creator: EFREM LUKATSKY and DEREK GATOPOULOS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Netflix blames tax dispute in Brazil for rare quarterly earnings letdown
item.description: Netflix missed the earnings target set by stock market analysts during the video streamer’s latest quarter, a letdown that the company blamed on a tax dispute in Brazil. The results announced Tuesday broke Netflix's six-quarter streak of posting a profit that eclipsed analysts' projections.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: OPM renews effort to consolidate 119 HR systems into one
item.description: The Office of Personnel Management is looking to implement a commercial software-as-a-service human capital management system for all agencies by July 4, 2027. The post OPM renews effort to consolidate 119 HR systems into one first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: AI jobs that pay $200K or more
item.description: Instead of fearing what comes next with artificial intelligence, think outside the box. Here are high-earning AI jobs that don't require a computer science degree.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI dominates Gartner’s top strategic technology trends for 2026
item.description: To no one’s surprise, AI took center stage at the Gartner IT Symposium/Xpo going on this week in Orlando, Fla., where the research firm made its annual presentation of the core technology trends set to shape enterprise IT in the coming year.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Big Tech is paying millions to train teachers on AI, in a push to bring chatbots into classrooms
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — On a scorching hot Saturday in San Antonio, dozens of teachers traded a day off for a glimpse of the future. The topic of the day’s workshop: enhancing instruction with artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: JOCELYN GECKER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Riverbed tackles AI data bottleneck with new Oracle-based service
item.description: Riverbed recently unveiled Data Express Service, a SaaS offering the company developed in partnership with Oracle that is designed to address the challenge of securely moving massive datasets quickly.
item.dc:creator: Network World
